{{CargoClone
|name=Taiin
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=155
|gene1={race} RUSH +50
|gene2={race} CIV +50
|gene3=Resolver: Mutagen Serum +1.5%
|gene4=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +6
|gene5=Zombie Minion Cloning SPD +1.2%
|gene6=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +10
|gene7=Zombie Minion Cloning SPD +2%
|}}
